assertions.title: Context-sensitive confidence — labeled EIN vs. unlabeled

steps.action: Open app at http://localhost:5173 and upload detect-007-ein-context.pdf via input[type=file]
steps.expected: App reaches preview/review screen with 2-page EIN context fixture loaded
steps.observed: Preview loaded successfully with page navigation (Page 1 of 2 / Page 2 of 2).
Page 1 highlight class/decision is `hl-r` / `REDACT`; sidebar shows one item under Removing.
Page 2 highlight class/decision is `hl-a` / `UNCERTAIN`; sidebar shows one item under Your decision.

steps.action: Check browser console errors and captured network requests
steps.expected: No console errors; no unexpected requests for this local flow
steps.observed: Console errors list is empty; captured request list is empty.

summary: VAL-DETECT-007 passed: labeled EIN was REDACT (red) and unlabeled EIN was UNCERTAIN (amber) using the assigned two-page fixture.
